doc_title: Unauthorized Practice of Law — ABA Model Rule 5.5
label: fabricated
reason: The actual ABA Model Rule 5.5 concerns multijurisdictional practice by lawyers, not paralegal supervision, and sections (b) and (c) are invented content not present in the authentic rule.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The actual ABA Model Rule 5.5 addresses multijurisdictional practice by *lawyers*, not paralegals/non-lawyers, and this document invents sections (b) and (c) with fabricated content about paralegal supervision requirements and non-existent "emergency exception" language that do not appear in the real rule.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The actual ABA Model Rule 5.5 concerns multijurisdictional practice by lawyers, not paralegal supervision, and sections (b) and (c) are invented content not present in the authentic rule.
